basic_details.job_title: District Magistrate Farrukhabad Panchayat Sahayak / Accountant cum DEO Recruitment 2026 - Apply Offline for 38 Posts
basic_details.post_name: Panchayat Sahayak / Accountant cum Data Entry Operator
basic_details.short_information: District Magistrate Farrukhabad Recruitment 2026: District Magistrate Farrukhabad has released the official notification for 38 Panchayat Sahayak / Accountant cum Data Entry Operator posts, inviting applications from eligible candidates. This recruitment provides an excellent opportunity for candidates seeking stable and well-paid government jobs.

age_limit.details: Please refer to the official notification for age limit details.

qualification.details: Please refer to the official notification for eligibility criteria details.

vacancy_details.Post Name: Panchayat Sahayak / Accountant cum Data Entry Operator

salary_details.details: Please refer to the official notification for salary details.

selection_process: Gram Panchayat Notice and Announcement Application Submission Forwarding Applications Merit List Preparation and Approval Scrutiny and Recommendation by District Committee Issuance of Appointment Letters
how_to_apply: Candidates who wish to apply for District Magistrate Farrukhabad Panchayat Sahayak / Accountant cum Data Entry Operator Recruitment 2026 through offline mode should follow the steps below.
Read the official notification carefully before applying.
Download the application form from the official website: .
Fill the application form carefully with correct information.
